{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240105520ED2D9059ED7F1335A7B"}"},"total":9979},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7142656001693860643","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄好书太少了，没有对比就没有伤害。这本很良心，四星给少了，改五星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1663029269,"group_id":"6959372117695532040","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1513363249567687"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6959372117695532040","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.25672644e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读119小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":89306,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":429264,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7142337873231741711","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很少见的无限流好书！
剧情上顺风顺水，主角在哪里都是基本无敌，有一点点上升空间，实力还可以保存。有详细的大纲细纲，少部分的参考读者意见，有自己的主见。每一部分都不拖沓，做完事马上换地图，好评。不虐无毒，很好。
三女主，还算可以了吧，不是单女主有点遗憾。感情戏的描写水平中上，虽然不轰轰烈烈，但胜在平平淡淡，比其它无脑收后宫的强的太多太多。
主角性格好评。稳健但不怂，杀伐果断不无脑。而且几位女主也有自己的故事，不是提线木偶，主角的跟屁虫，好评。
文笔也很老练，逻辑自洽，描写生动精彩不小白，有燃点有爽点。
总的来说，各方面都是上游水平，很爽的一部爽文。但让我扣一分的缺陷是，剧情从头到尾都是比较平淡的，毕竟主角实力摆在那里，半无敌文的剧情的确不容易写的跌宕起伏。一口气看到后期会感到乏味。这个问题是无敌文的通病了，难得的是作者居然写了这么多字。
非常的推荐！绝对的少见的好文！","text_exts":[{"e":187,"s":183,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774285552F1335A7B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227142337873231741711%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226959372117695532040%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662955194,"group_id":"6959372117695532040","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小孩减重还是多啊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0aF+koet6k17N6TRal8eqE3HK/oB2W4dm/VEbnDPQw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/625865d612ed4694a23509d020dbb8ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882224&x-signature=yQmv7wIGWvJVfMvie9xNO%2Flg5vQ%3D","user_id":"1513363249567687","user_name":"我真看不下去呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1513363249567687","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6959372117695532040","book_info":{"abstract":"从笑傲江湖世界开始，成为华山派少掌门。
本想苟着发育不问世事的岳阳，在被迫踏入江湖中后才发现，
原来这世间没有什么事，是一剑不能解决的。
打破天地桎梏，一路飞升而上，低武，中武，高武，仙侠，西游，洪荒……
一剑在手，漫游诸天。
